title: Keyboard Place Extender
description: This mod extends your keyboard place, but beware it can get you kicked for too many packets.
body:
This mod can extend your keyboard place! The possibility is endless, here is how to use it:
In chat, type "!kbp (extend/stable/reset) (number if not reset)". Use extend to higher it, stable to stable it, and reset to set it to normal. It only happens inside of minecraft, and only for your place/use keybind too, to make things easier for you!
Keep in mind, it isn't validated if this is allowed in tierlist fights just yet.

What does it mean to extend your keyboard place you may ask? To extend your keyboard place, it changes your keyboards repeat delay to your liking, which increases speed ingame. The higher, the faster. Keep in mind it only happens in minecraft.  

The keyboard place extender can also kick you for bad packets if set too high. 

Important Information:
The extender CAN be used with your mouse buttons, however that wouldn't be allowed in a tierlist. It's mainly for keyboard place, as keyboard place users can extend their cps with this as it's already allowed. Pretty much filter keys but in minecraft.
